children.text: Not later than 12 months after , the President shall submit to the congressional committees specified in subsection (b) a report on the implementation of . The report shall include any recommendations for additional measures or appropriation requests, beyond the requirements of , to increase the effectiveness of sharing of information between and among Federal, State, and local entities.November 25, 2002section 482 of this titlesection 482 of this title
